leadText: Royal Avenue (Japanese: ロイヤルアベニュー Royal Avenue) is a street built around the Battle Royal Dome situated on Akala Island in Alola, connecting to Route 6 on its western end and to Route 7 on its northeastern end.

sections.title: Places of interest
sections.text: Contents 1 Places of interest 1.1 Thrifty Megamart 1.2 Malasada shop 1.3 Pokémon Fan Club Places of interest [ edit | edit source ] Thrifty Megamart [ edit | edit source ] Thrifty Megamart redirects here. For the store's original, abandoned site, see Thrifty Megamart (Abandoned Site) . If the player has a discount coupon (given when the player enters the store), they will be refunded half of the total price instantly when shopping here. As the price of all items is already halved, the player will not be refunded any money if a Roto Bargain is in effect. Center-left checkout Poké Ball $ 200 Great Ball $ 600 Heal Ball $ 300 Nest Ball $ 1,000 Timer Ball $ 1,000 Center-right checkout Potion $ 200 Antidote $ 200 Paralyze Heal $ 300 Burn Heal $ 300 Ice Heal $ 100 Awakening $ 100 Repel $ 400 Right checkout in S M Strange Souvenir $ 3,000 Right checkout in US UM Strange Souvenir $ 3,000 Strange Souvenir $ 3,000 Strange Souvenir $ 3,000 Strange Souvenir $ 3,000 Strange Souvenir $ 3,000 The man at the leftmost counter will dismiss the player until they become Champion . If the player is Champion, the man will recognize their talent and introduce himself as Kagetora, a retired Trainer who used to be one of the Eevee users . He will ask the player to find and defeat the other Eevee users. After completing that task, Kagetora himself will battle the player, and if the player wins he will reward them with Eevium Z . Malasada shop [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Malasada The left attendant sells Sour Malasada for $ 200 and Dry Malasada for $ 200, which is immediately fed to a Pokémon and increases its affection . The right attendant sells the Bag item Big Malasada for $ 350. Right attendant Big Malasada $ 350 Pokémon Fan Club [ edit | edit source ] Main article: Pokémon Fan Club In Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon only, the Pokémon Fan Club building is located next to the Malasada Shop. If the player has a Pokémon with maximum affection, the Pokémon Fan Club Chairman will give them the Lovey-Dovey Heart background to be used in photo shoots in the Alola Photo Club .

sections.title: Thrifty Megamart
sections.text: Thrifty Megamart [ edit | edit source ] Thrifty Megamart redirects here. For the store's original, abandoned site, see Thrifty Megamart (Abandoned Site) . If the player has a discount coupon (given when the player enters the store), they will be refunded half of the total price instantly when shopping here. As the price of all items is already halved, the player will not be refunded any money if a Roto Bargain is in effect. If the player is Champion, the man will recognize their talent and introduce himself as Kagetora, a retired Trainer who used to be one of the Eevee users . He will ask the player to find and defeat the other Eevee users. After completing that task, Kagetora himself will battle the player, and if the player wins he will reward them with Eevium Z .
